title: Private Comments
excerpt: Is it possible to have a feature whereby you can make private comments between internal team members about an item that are not visible to our clients who we will have shared the project boards with.  We use the comments…

posts.author: CaroleAsker (Carole Asker)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have a feature whereby you can make private comments between internal team members about an item that are not visible to our clients who we will have shared the project boards with. We use the comments to communicate as a team but do not necessarily want the client to view our comments. thanks

posts.author: hughmacken (Hugh M.)
posts.cookedHtml: This is very important for us. There is a related thread about this with many more votes and comments here: Internal-Only Comments

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are happy to introduce the Private Notes and Comments app. That you can keep private notes and internal-only comments under the item view.
You can install the app via link: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
You can install the app via Marketplace by Searching Private Notes and Comments
